test_cases.test_case: Verify user can log in with a registered mobile number and valid OTP
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: User is successfully logged in and redirected to the application home/dashboard

test_cases.test_case: Verify user can request OTP for a valid registered mobile number
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: OTP is generated and sent to the registered mobile number

test_cases.test_case: Verify user can resend OTP after OTP expiry
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: A new OTP is sent and can be used successfully for login

test_cases.test_case: Verify user can log in with OTP entered in correct format/length
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: OTP is accepted only when it matches the required format and length

test_cases.test_case: Verify login fails when OTP is incorrect
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: User remains on login screen and receives an invalid OTP message

test_cases.test_case: Verify login fails when OTP is expired
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: User is not logged in and is prompted to request a new OTP

test_cases.test_case: Verify login fails when mobile number is not registered
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: System displays an error stating the mobile number is not registered

test_cases.test_case: Verify user can enter the minimum valid mobile number length accepted by the application
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: Mobile number at minimum valid length is accepted for OTP request

test_cases.test_case: Verify user can enter the maximum valid mobile number length accepted by the application
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: Mobile number at maximum valid length is accepted for OTP request

test_cases.test_case: Verify mobile number field rejects input below minimum length
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: System shows validation error and does not allow OTP request

test_cases.test_case: Verify mobile number field rejects input above maximum length
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: System shows validation error and does not allow OTP request

test_cases.test_case: Verify mobile number field accepts only numeric digits and rejects alphabets/special characters
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: Non-numeric input is rejected or sanitized and validation message is shown

test_cases.test_case: Verify OTP field accepts only numeric digits
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: Alphabetic and special character inputs are rejected or blocked

test_cases.test_case: Verify OTP field rejects input shorter than required OTP length
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: System shows OTP length validation error and prevents login

test_cases.test_case: Verify OTP field rejects input longer than required OTP length
test_cases.automation_reson: Critical business flow, frequently executed, stable, and repeatable
test_cases.expected_result: System shows OTP length validation error and prevents login
